sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105326" key="trithmoriai=os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρῐτημορι-αῖος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> sq., <sense id="n105326.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">δίεσις</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2054.tlg001:1:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.9</biblScope></bibl></cit>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1165.tlg001:162:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollod.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Poliorc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">162.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
